{"cards": [{"name": "Forge of Inspiration", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• ~ deals 4 damage to any target.
• Create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens with haste.
• Draw two cards, then discard two cards.", "flavor_text": ""Ideas are like sparks—some ignite, others explode."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Modal instant that showcases red's versatility: direct damage (primary), token creation (tertiary), and impulsive card selection (secondary). Each mode is appropriately costed for 4 mana at rare, offering tactical flexibility while staying in red's color pie."}, {"name": "The Wild Hunt", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}{G}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
II — Create a 3/3 green Beast creature token.
III — Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain trample until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A green Saga that tells the story of a primal hunt building to a climactic finale. Chapter I provides mana fixing (green's ramp), Chapter II creates board presence with a reasonable threat, and Chapter III delivers a powerful combat boost with trample. The curve builds naturally and stays firmly in green's wheelhouse."}, {"name": "Prismatic Wellspring", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.", "flavor_text": "Where all colors converge, possibility flows eternal.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "A colorless nonbasic land that provides mana fixing at a cost. The activated ability requires additional mana investment, making it a slower but more flexible option for multicolor decks. Enters tapped to prevent it from being too strong for fixing. Appropriate power level for uncommon."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Ancient roots run deeper than memory, connecting all living things in an endless web of growth.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A basic Forest with evocative flavor text that captures the interconnectedness and timeless nature of forest ecosystems. The flavor emphasizes growth and connection, core themes of green mana."}]}
